skill.name: huawei-cloud-modelarts-skill
skill.description: Manage Huawei Cloud ModelArts resources including training jobs, models, inference services, and notebooks
skill.summary: Unified management interface for Huawei Cloud ModelArts platform resources
skill.author: modelarts-agent

security_audit.summary: Static analysis detected 35 potential issues, all are false positives after contextual review. Code execution patterns are markdown documentation examples, network URLs are legitimate documentation links, and credential handling implements data redaction (a security feature). The skill uses official modelarts-sdk with proper security practices: no credential storage, runtime-only authentication, and automatic sensitive data masking.

content.value_statement: Simplify AI model development and deployment on Huawei Cloud ModelArts. This skill provides unified resource management for training jobs, models, inference services, and notebooks with built-in security features.
actual_capabilities: Query resource overview including OBS bucket count and status
List and manage ModelArts training jobs with configurable limits
Create new training jobs with custom code directories and boot files
List and query deployed models on ModelArts platform
Manage inference services and check service status
List and manage ModelArts Notebook instances
limitations: Requires valid Huawei Cloud ModelArts account credentials
Network connectivity required for all operations
Cannot manage resources from other cloud providers

use_cases.title: Monitor Training Resources
use_cases.description: Data scientist needs to check active training jobs and resource allocation across ModelArts platform

use_cases.title: Deploy ML Models
use_cases.description: DevOps engineer wants to deploy trained models as inference services and monitor service health

use_cases.title: Manage Notebooks
use_cases.description: Researcher needs to list and manage multiple ModelArts Notebook instances for different experiments

prompt_templates.title: Check Resource Overview
prompt_templates.prompt: List all my ModelArts resources including training jobs, models, and services
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick status check of all ModelArts resources

prompt_templates.title: Create Training Job
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a training job named my-model-training with code in obs://my-bucket/code/ and boot file train.py
prompt_templates.scenario: Starting a new model training job

prompt_templates.title: List Recent Models
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the last 10 models deployed on ModelArts

prompt_templates.title: Check Service Status
prompt_templates.prompt: List all active inference services and their status

best_practices: Always verify credentials are properly configured before running resource operations
Use descriptive job names when creating training jobs for easier tracking
Check service status before deploying new models to avoid resource conflicts
Monitor resource usage to optimize costs on ModelArts platform
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode credentials in scripts or configuration files
Avoid creating training jobs without proper resource limits
Do not ignore error messages from API calls
Never commit sensitive data or model artifacts to public repositories

faq.question: What authentication method does this skill use?
faq.answer: The skill uses Huawei Cloud ModelArts runtime temporary security credentials through the official SDK. It requires no persistent credential storage.

faq.question: Can I manage resources from other cloud providers?
faq.answer: No, this skill is specifically designed for Huawei Cloud ModelArts platform resources only.

faq.question: How are sensitive credentials handled?
faq.answer: The skill implements automatic data desensitization. All sensitive fields including access keys, secrets, and network information are masked in outputs.

faq.question: What operations can I perform on training jobs?
faq.answer: You can list existing training jobs, create new jobs with custom parameters, and query job status and details.

faq.question: Does this skill store any data or credentials?
faq.answer: No, the skill runs entirely in memory with no caching, storage, or persistence. Credentials are used only for runtime authentication.

faq.question: What permissions do I need on ModelArts?
faq.answer: You need appropriate ModelArts service permissions including OBS access, training job management, and model deployment permissions.
